name: My case is in LA—any special AI rules for California lawyers?
description: Verify accuracy and confidentiality like everywhere.[3]

mainEntity.name: My case is in LA—any special AI rules for California lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Verify accuracy and confidentiality like everywhere.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: California follows national ethics trends: verify AI, protect confidentiality, disclose use where required.[3] No state-specific bans yet, but federal precedents apply.[1] Key factors: Hallucination checks mandatory; secure data; court notifications possible.[3] Confirm your lawyer's compliance. Nationwide consistency grows.[6]
